name: susura
description: A calm, private AI overlay for live calls and screen work.

scripts.dev: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run macos-audio:build && npm run electron:sign-dev && concurrently -k "cross-env VITE_SUSURA_TRANSCRIPT_DEBUG_LOG=1 vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 SUSURA_TRANSCRIPT_DEBUG_LOG=1 VITE_SUSURA_TRANSCRIPT_DEBUG_LOG=1 electron ."
scripts.package:prepare: npm run generate-icons && npm run build && npm run desktop-backend:build:release && npm run macos-audio:build:release
scripts.dist:win: echo "Windows packaging is scaffolded but not enabled yet."
scripts.dist:linux: echo "Linux packaging is scaffolded but not enabled yet."
scripts.smoke:electron: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run electron:sign-dev && concurrently -k --success first "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 SUSURA_SMOKE_EXIT_MS=250 electron ."
scripts.smoke:electron:built: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run build && npm run electron:sign-dev && cross-env SUSURA_SMOKE_EXIT_MS=250 electron .
scripts.smoke:renderer-llm: npm run build && npm run electron:sign-dev && cross-env SUSURA_RENDERER_LLM_SMOKE=1 electron .
scripts.smoke:renderer-real-llm: npm run build && npm run electron:sign-dev && cross-env SUSURA_RENDERER_REAL_LLM_SMOKE=1 electron .
scripts.smoke:resources: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run build && npm run electron:sign-dev && cross-env SUSURA_RESOURCE_SMOKE_MS=3000 SUSURA_RESOURCE_SMOKE_MAX_WORKING_SET_MB=450 electron .
scripts.smoke:system-audio: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run macos-audio:build && npm run electron:sign-dev && concurrently -k --success first "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && rm -f /tmp/susura-system-audio.out /tmp/susura-system-audio.err && open -n -W -o /tmp/susura-system-audio.out --stderr /tmp/susura-system-audio.err --env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 --env SUSURA_SYSTEM_AUDIO_SMOKE_MS=8000 node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app --args \"$PWD\"; code=$?; cat /tmp/susura-system-audio.out 2>/dev/null; cat /tmp/susura-system-audio.err 2>/dev/null; exit $code"
scripts.smoke:local-parakeet-browser-system-audi: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run macos-audio:build && npm run electron:sign-dev && node scripts/smoke-local-parakeet-browser-system-audio.mjs
scripts.smoke:local-parakeet-renderer-known-text: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run macos-audio:build && npm run electron:sign-dev && node scripts/smoke-local-parakeet-renderer-known-text.mjs
scripts.bench:live-call-pipeline: npm run desktop-backend:build && npm run macos-audio:build && npm run electron:sign-dev && node scripts/bench-live-call-pipeline.mjs
